messages.message: ES2015 module syntax is preferred over namespaces.
'payload.ws ?? ''' will use Object's default stringification format ('[object Object]') when stringified.
'payload.role ?? 'user'' will use Object's default stringification format ('[object Object]') when stringified.
'payload.sid ?? ''' will use Object's default stringification format ('[object Object]') when stringified.
Forbidden non-null assertion.

suggestions.desc: Consider using the optional chain operator `?.` instead. This operator includes runtime checks, so it is safer than the compile-only non-null assertion operator.

messages.message: Unnecessary conditional, expected left-hand side of `??` operator to be possibly null or undefined.
Unsafe member access [workspaceParam] on an `any` value.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
